flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Christian Brothers University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (953 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Christian Brothers University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 905).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Christian Brothers University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (54.8% → 41.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Christian Brothers University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.8k → $38.4k).
